case_title: CURTIS W. BERLIND VS. DON VITO OZUNA FOOD CORP.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,608.40 FILED BY BERLIND, CURTIS W. AS TO DEFENDANT DON VITO OZUNA FOOD CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE:$82.80 SERVED AUG-15-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DON VITO OZUNA FOOD CORP.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF CURTIS W. BERLIND. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT DON VITO FOOD CORP. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
